programs.title: Flip Or Flop
programs.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a home in Long Beach, California that sounds like the kind of project that has become their standard.

programs.title: Mini Reni
programs.desc: Joanna heads to New York for a special renovation. She blends warm, neutral colours to design a new office for Hoda Kotb with a fresh, modern feel.

programs.title: Small Spaces
programs.desc: Join James Koh as he meets with inspiring individuals across Asia who have discovered ingenious hacks to expand tiny living areas.

programs.title: Rock The Block
programs.desc: Ty Pennington challenges the teams with their toughest obstacle yet: transform a bonus loft space and staircase in only 48 hours.

programs.title: Neighborhood Watch
programs.desc: From bad ideas to carelessness and just plain not thinking, all our neighbours' fails, fiascos, and face palms are immortalised on camera.

programs.title: Neighborhood Watch
programs.desc: Ideas that seemed good at the time. Practical jokes with unexpected results. Best intentions gone awry. Not everything turns out as expected.
